managerComments: Juan has shown exceptional technical skills and has been a reliable team member. Ready for more leadership responsibilities.
strengths: Strong problem-solving, excellent code quality, reliable delivery.
improvements: Could improve communication with non-technical stakeholders.

managerComments: Good performance in first full year. Technical skills are above average. Continue building leadership skills.

improvements: Take more initiative in proposing solutions. Build stakeholder management skills.
